name: 呼伦贝尔
description: Hulunbuir, located in northeastern Inner Mongolia, is a vast grassland paradise featuring the legendary Horqin Sand Beach, historic Russian-style buildings, and the pristine Dahur lakes. Experience authentic Mongolian culture, horseback riding across endless grasslands, and stays in traditional Mongolian yurts under star-filled skies.
highlights: Horqin Sand Beach - Desert meets grassland

climate.tips: Best visited in summer (June-August) for grassland scenery. Fall offers golden colors. Winters are extremely cold. Pack layers even in summer as temperatures vary greatly between day and night.

attractions.name: 呼伦贝尔大草原
attractions.description: One of China's largest grasslands offering endless prairie views, traditional Mongolian yurt stays, horseback riding, and authentic cultural experiences.
attractions.tips: Stay overnight in a yurt for authentic experience. Arrive early morning for best photos. Hire local guide for grassland activities.

attractions.name: 满洲里
attractions.description: Border city with stunning Russian-style architecture, matryoshka doll factories, and the world's largest Genghis Khan statue.
attractions.tips: Great for Russian souvenirs. The statue complex takes 2-3 hours. Combine with nearby Hulunbuir grassland.

attractions.name: 科尔沁沙地
attractions.description: Unique desert grassland area where sand dunes meet prairie, offering camel rides, dune activities, and spectacular sunset views.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset. Wear sunglasses and sunscreen. Combine with nearby grassland tours.

attractions.name: 达赉湖
attractions.description: Pristine cluster of lakes with wetland ecosystems, diverse birdlife, and peaceful natural surroundings away from crowds.
attractions.tips: Best for nature lovers. Morning visits for bird watching. Bring binoculars for bird watching.

attractions.name: 成吉思汗陵
attractions.description: World's largest Genghis Khan statue at 46 meters tall, with museum, cultural exhibits, and Mongolian ceremonial experiences.
attractions.tips: Arrive early for ceremonial show. Allow half day. Combine with nearby Ordos museum.

attractions.name: 额尔古纳
attractions.description: Border town with Russian influences, access to primeval forest, and gateway to northern grassland scenic areas.
attractions.tips: Good base for exploring northern areas. Try Russian-Mongolian fusion cuisine. Hire car for scenic drives.

attractions.name: 扎兰屯
attractions.description: Beautiful valley city known for peaks, weaver villages, and the famous Zhalantun Dahur cultural heritage.
attractions.tips: Visit in fall for golden birch forests. The Dahur ethnic group culture is unique. Good hiking opportunities.

attractions.name: 莫尔道嘎
attractions.description: Primeval forest area with ancient trees, diverse wildlife, and scenic drives through Russia's border region.
attractions.tips: Best in September for autumn foliage. Early morning for misty forest views. Stay in forest lodge.

attractions.name: 阿尔山
attractions.description: Volcanic landscape with granite pillars, mineral pools, and pristine forest, plus Russia's border mountain views.
attractions.tips: Stay overnight to explore fully. Hot springs are excellent. Fall foliage is spectacular. Book lodging in advance.

attractions.name: 乌兰毛都
attractions.description: Unspoiled grassland with rolling hills, traditional Mongolian villages, and authentic nomadic experiences.
attractions.tips: Less developed than main grassland areas. More authentic experience. Stay in yurt camps. Great for photographers.

attractions.name: 黑山头
attractions.description: Border grassland area with Russia visible across the river, famous for sunset views and traditional horse culture.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset for golden prairie views. Horse riding is excellent here. Traditional horse performances available.

attractions.name: 巴彦呼硕
attractions.description: Traditional Mongolian grassland area known for the famous Mongolian song 'My Motherland is Like a Garden' originating here.
attractions.tips: The song 'My Motherland is Like a Garden' was composed here. Traditional Mongolian hospitality. Try air-dried beef.

attractions.name: 五大连池
attractions.description: UNESCO site with five volcanic crater lakes, black volcanic rock, mineral springs, and unique geological formations.
attractions.tips: Old and new craters offer different scenery. The mineral water is famous. Combine with nearby forest areas.

attractions.name: 牙克石
attractions.description: Forest city on the edge of the Greater Khingan Range, known for ski resorts and snow-covered winter landscapes.
attractions.tips: Winter sports destination. Combined with Greater Khingan Range tours. Excellent for snow photography.

attractions.name: 扎赉特
attractions.description: Rice paddies meet grassland at this transitional zone, offering unique agricultural landscapes and Dahur ethnic experiences.
attractions.tips: Best in summer for green paddies, fall for golden harvest. Unique transition zone scenery. Excellent for photography.

attractions.name: 新巴尔虎左旗
attractions.description: Traditional Mongolian grassland area with authentic nomadic lifestyle, horse breeding, and cultural preservation.
attractions.tips: Authentic Mongolian experience without tourist crowds. Local families welcome visitors. Try traditional dairy products.

attractions.name: 新巴尔虎右旗
attractions.description: Western grassland area with large-scale ranching operations, beautiful sunset views, and traditional Mongolian culture.
attractions.tips: Excellent for night sky photography. Traditional large-scale herding culture. Combine with Manzhouli visit.

attractions.name: 莫尔格勒河
attractions.description: Winding river creating mesmerizing curves across the grassland, offering iconic prairie photography opportunities.
attractions.tips: Best photographed from elevated viewpoints. Early morning for mist. The winding patterns are most visible from above.

attractions.name: 根河
attractions.description: China's 'cold pole' with extreme winter temperatures, reindeer herding communities, and pristine forest scenery.
attractions.tips: Extremely cold in winter. Reindeer herding is unique to this area. The '-58°C record is celebrated here. Best for adventure seekers.

attractions.name: 双合
attractions.description: Ecosystem research station turned scenic area with virgin forest, rare birds, and pristine natural environment.
attractions.tips: Excellent for forest bathing and nature observation. The 'natural oxygen bar' is real. Great for hiking and wildlife watching.

attractions.name: 伊春森林
attractions.description: Part of the Greater Khingan Range with ancient trees, diverse wildlife, and beautiful autumn foliage.
attractions.tips: Best in September-October for fall colors. The '#1 pine tree is famous. Great for camping and hiking.

attractions.name: 阿尔山国家森林公园
attractions.description: Volcanic landscape with crater lakes, hot springs, and granite formations creating unique natural scenery.
attractions.tips: Stay in Arxan town overnight. Early entry recommended. The hot springs are excellent after hiking. Combined ticket is good value.

attractions.name: 呼伦湖
attractions.description: 中国第五大淡水湖，面积2339平方公里，蒙古语意为海一样的湖。
attractions.address: 呼伦贝尔市新巴尔虎右旗
attractions.tips: 夏季最佳，可品尝全鱼宴。

attractions.name: 额尔古纳湿地
attractions.description: 亚洲第一湿地，面积12.6万公顷，被誉为亚洲之肾。
attractions.tips: 秋季最美，色彩斑斓。

attractions.name: 莫尔道嘎国家森林公园
attractions.description: 中国面积最大的森林公园，有南有西双版纳北有莫尔道嘎之称。
attractions.address: 额尔古纳市莫尔道嘎镇
attractions.tips: 秋季五彩斑斓最美。

attractions.name: 室韦俄罗斯民族乡
attractions.description: 中国唯一的俄罗斯族民族乡，可体验中俄边境风情。
attractions.tips: 可品尝俄式美食。

attractions.name: 黑山头口岸
attractions.description: 中俄边境口岸，可远眺俄罗斯小镇，体验边境风情。
attractions.tips: 日落时分最美。

attractions.name: 满洲里套娃广场
attractions.description: 世界上最大的套娃主题广场，有世界最大套娃建筑。
attractions.tips: 夜景灯光很美。

attractions.name: 阿尔山温泉
attractions.description: 世界最大的功能型矿泉群，有48眼温泉，水温各异。
attractions.tips: 四季皆宜，冬季雪中泡温泉。

attractions.name: 阿尔山国家森林公园
attractions.description: 集火山、温泉、森林、草原于一体的国家级森林公园。
attractions.tips: 秋季最美。

attractions.name: 海拉尔河
attractions.description: 呼伦贝尔的母亲河，穿城而过，两岸风光优美。
attractions.tips: 傍晚散步最佳。

attractions.name: 海拉尔国家森林公园
attractions.description: 中国唯一以樟子松为主的国家级森林公园。
attractions.tips: 四季景色各异。

attractions.name: 敖鲁古雅使鹿部落
attractions.description: 中国最后的使鹿部落，可近距离接触驯鹿。
attractions.tips: 可喂驯鹿。

attractions.name: 根河冷极
attractions.description: 中国最冷的地方，冬季最低温度-58°C。
attractions.tips: 冬季体验极寒。

attractions.name: 新巴尔虎右旗草原
attractions.description: 呼伦贝尔最美的草原之一，有贝尔湖和呼伦湖。
attractions.tips: 夏季最美。

attractions.name: 扎兰屯吊桥公园
attractions.description: 始建于1905年，有百年吊桥和秀水风景区。
attractions.tips: 夏季避暑好去处。

attractions.name: 阿尔山天池
attractions.description: 火山口湖，海拔1332米，是中国海拔最高的天池之一。
attractions.tips: 秋季色彩最美。

attractions.name: 额尔古纳河
attractions.description: 中俄界河，蜿蜒流淌，两岸风光如画。
attractions.tips: 日落时分最美。

attractions.name: 呼伦贝尔民族博物
attractions.description: 展示蒙古族、鄂温克族等少数民族历史文化。
attractions.tips: 了解草原文化的好去处。

attractions.name: 世界反法西斯战争海拉尔纪念园
attractions.description: 日本关东军海拉尔要塞遗址，爱国主义教育基地。
attractions.tips: 了解抗战历史。

attractions.name: 呼和诺尔草原
attractions.description: 呼伦贝尔代表性草原景区，可体验蒙古族生活。
attractions.tips: 夏季那达慕大会。

attractions.name: 莫日格勒河
attractions.description: 被誉为天下第一曲水，蜿蜒在草原上如巨龙。
attractions.tips: 登高俯瞰最美。

attractions.name: 白音哈达草原
attractions.description: 呼伦贝尔保存最完好的草原之一。
attractions.tips: 人少安静。

attractions.name: 甘河林业局
attractions.description: 大兴安岭原始森林区，可体验森林徒步。
attractions.tips: 注意安全。

attractions.name: 鄂温克族自治旗
attractions.description: 鄂温克族聚居地，可体验独特的游牧文化。
attractions.tips: 了解少数民族文化。

attractions.name: 新巴尔虎左旗草原
attractions.description: 呼伦贝尔草原核心区，有著名的乌兰泡。
attractions.tips: 夏季最美。

attractions.name: 阿尔山玫瑰峰
attractions.description: 火山岩形成的红色山峰，形状如玫瑰盛开。
attractions.tips: 日落时分最美。

attractions.name: 海拉尔白桦林
attractions.description: 成片的白桦林，秋季金黄一片，非常壮观。

attractions.name: 柴河月亮天池
attractions.description: 形如弯月的火山口湖，景色优美。
attractions.tips: 秋季最美。

attractions.name: 扎兰屯秀水风景区
attractions.description: 以秀水河为核心的风景区，有小桂林之称。
attractions.tips: 夏季避暑好去处。

restaurants.name: 蒙古族手把肉
restaurants.description: Traditional Mongolian boiled lamb, served with hands. The signature grassland dish, tender and juicy.

restaurants.name: 诺尔塔奶茶馆
restaurants.description: Authentic Mongolian milk tea and dairy products in traditional setting with Russian influences.

restaurants.name: 草原情奶茶馆
restaurants.description: Family-run milk tea shop serving traditional Mongolian dairy drinks and snacks.

restaurants.name: 满洲里俄式餐厅
restaurants.description: Russian-style restaurant with matryoshka dolls decorating walls, serving Russian-Mongolian fusion dishes.

restaurants.name: 蒙古族涮羊肉
restaurants.description: Northern-style lamb hotpot with thin slices, perfect for cold grassland evenings.

restaurants.name: 蒙古族馅饼
restaurants.description: Traditional pan-fried meat pies with flaky crust and savory fillings, popular breakfast item.

restaurants.name: 铁山笨蛋
restaurants.description: Rustic restaurant famous for mountain eggs from free-range chickens and forest mushrooms.

restaurants.name: 蒙古族烤肉串
restaurants.description: Night market BBQ stalls serving authentic Mongolian lamb skewers grilled over open flame.

restaurants.name: 根河山珍
restaurants.description: Restaurant specializing in forest mushrooms, wild herbs, and game meat from Greater Khingan region.

restaurants.name: 五大连池矿泉鱼
restaurants.description: Fresh fish from volcanic crater lakes, cooked with mineral water for unique flavor.

restaurants.name: 蒙古族奶酪
restaurants.description: Traditional dairy shop making various Mongolian cheese products from yak and cow milk.

restaurants.name: 俄式列巴房
restaurants.description: Bakery making traditional Russian bread (khleb) and pastries with Russian-Mongolian influences.

restaurants.name: 草原风干肉
restaurants.description: Traditional air-dried beef and lamb, aged in the dry grassland air for intense flavor.

restaurants.name: 阿尔山野菜馆
restaurants.description: Restaurant serving dishes made with wild vegetables and herbs foraged from Arxan's volcanic landscape.

restaurants.name: 满洲里大饭店
restaurants.description: Upscale restaurant in historic Russian-style building serving refined Russian-Chinese fusion cuisine.

restaurants.name: 蒙古族奶茶早餐
restaurants.description: Traditional Mongolian breakfast served in yurt camps with milk tea, fried dough, and dairy products.

restaurants.name: 羊肉烧麦
restaurants.description: Popular breakfast spot serving lamb shaomai (dumplings) with rich broth, local specialty.

restaurants.name: 俄罗斯糖果屋
restaurants.description: Sweet shop with wide variety of Russian chocolates, candies, and pastries imported from Russia.

restaurants.name: 牛头宴
restaurants.description: Traditional Mongolian feast featuring whole cow head, served for special occasions and ceremonies.

restaurants.name: 蒙古族酸奶
restaurants.description: Fresh yak yogurt and cow milk yogurt, served with honey and graham for authentic taste.

restaurants.name: 火锅鱼头
restaurants.description: Local fish head hotpot with fresh river fish from nearby water systems, rich and flavorful broth.

restaurants.name: 奶酪披萨
restaurants.description: Russian-Mongolian fusion pizza with generous cheese and local meat toppings.

restaurants.name: 马奶酒
restaurants.description: Traditional fermented mare's milk alcoholic drink, a cultural experience in Mongolian grassland.

restaurants.name: 松茸炖鸡
restaurants.description: Premium matsutake mushrooms from Greater Khingan cooked with free-range chicken in clear broth.

restaurants.name: 蒙古包子
restaurants.description: Steamed buns stuffed with lamb and vegetables, a hearty Mongolian breakfast staple.

arrival.frequency: Daily flights from Beijing, Hohhot, Harbin
arrival.tips: Airport 10km from city center. Airport bus or taxi to city. Best connection via Beijing or Harbin.
Train is scenic but long. Sleeper berths recommended. Best for those who enjoy train travel.

rental: Driver with car is better option

hotels.name: 呼伦贝尔天骄酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best luxury option in city. Book during grassland peak season (July-August) well ahead.

hotels.name: 满洲里香格里拉大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best base for Manzhouli sightseeing. Russian-style building. Book city view rooms.

hotels.name: 蒙古包度假酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Book yurt stay for authentic experience. Advance booking essential in summer. Some yurts have private bathroom.

hotels.name: 根河生态酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good base for cold pole exploration. Ask about reindeer herding experiences. Heating available.

hotels.name: 阿尔山温泉宾馆
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect after hiking Arxan parks. Hot spring included in some packages. Book spa treatments ahead.

hotels.name: 满洲里青年旅舍
hotels.bookingTips: Best for backpackers. Great location for Russian souvenirs. Book during Russian New Year for festivities.

hotels.name: 五大连池火山温泉酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Stay overnight for full volcanic park experience. Hot springs are highlight. Combined tickets available.

hotels.name: 额尔古纳俄罗斯民族乡
hotels.bookingTips: Stay with local Russian-Mongolian families. Authentic cross-border cultural experience. Good base for birch forest.

hotels.name: 呼伦贝尔草原星空营地
hotels.bookingTips: Best for photographers and stargazers. No light pollution. Book clear weather nights. Photography tour packages available.

hotels.name: 牙克石滑雪度假村
hotels.bookingTips: Best for winter visitors. Ski season December-March. Snow scenery is beautiful year-round.

hotels.name: 扎兰屯宾馆
hotels.bookingTips: Good base for exploring eastern Hulunbuir. Room rates very reasonable. Simple but clean.

hotels.name: 新巴尔虎左旗草原民宿
hotels.nameEn: Xin Balin Left Banner Grassland Homestay
hotels.bookingTips: Most authentic grassland experience. Stay with local Mongolian families. Limited English. Bring gifts from your city.

hotels.name: 伊春森林度假酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Base for Greater Khingan exploration. Great for autumn foliage season. Fall package deals available.

hotels.name: 莫尔道嘎林家乐
hotels.bookingTips: Stay in local forest lodge. Excellent for primeval forest exploration. Simple but charming accommodation.

hotels.name: 满洲里套娃酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Fun themed hotel for families. Great for matryoshka doll photos. Central location for shopping.

tips: May not work in remote yurts

culturalTips.title: Mongolian Hospitality
culturalTips.content: Mongolians greet guests with hada (ceremonial silk scarf) and offer milk tea. Accepting hospitality shows respect. Refusing food or drink can offend hosts.

culturalTips.title: Yurt Culture
culturalTips.content: The yurt (ger) is traditional Mongolian home. The north side is the most honored position. Never step on the threshold or point feet at the central fire.

culturalTips.title: Mongolian Diet
culturalTips.content: Mongolian cuisine centers on lamb, beef, dairy, and grains. Hand-grabbed lamb and milk tea are staples. Traditional dishes reflect nomadic lifestyle and harsh climate.

culturalTips.title: Toasting Etiquette
culturalTips.content: When offered milk tea, receive with both hands. It's polite to drink at least a little. Snuff (powdered tobacco) may be offered instead - decline politely if not desired.

culturalTips.title: Horse Culture
culturalTips.content: Horses are central to Mongolian identity. Never hit or abuse horses. When riding, follow local guide's instructions. Horse shows demonstrate traditional equestrian skills.

culturalTips.title: Shamanism and Buddhism
culturalTips.content: Mongolians practice a blend of shamanism and Tibetan Buddhism. Prayer flags, shamanic ceremonies, and Buddhist shrines coexist. Show respect at religious sites.

culturalTips.title: Grassland Protection
culturalTips.content: The grassland ecosystem is fragile. Stay on designated paths, don't disturb wildlife, and minimize plastic use. Support sustainable tourism practices.

culturalTips.title: Nadam Festival
culturalTips.content: The traditional Mongolian 'Three Manly Games' - wrestling, horse racing, and archery - are showcased at Nadam festivals held during summer months.

culturalTips.title: Dairy Products
culturalTips.content: Mongolians produce various dairy: milk, yogurt, cheese, air-dried curd (hurung), and mare's milk (airag). These are important nutritional sources and cultural items.

culturalTips.title: Traditional Dress
culturalTips.content: The Mongolian deel is traditional clothing worn for festivals. Modern Mongolians wear it on special occasions. Visitors welcome to try deel for photos.

culturalTips.title: Russian Influence
culturalTips.content: Manzhouli and Eerguna have strong Russian influences from historic trade. Russian architecture, food, and culture are visible. Matryoshka dolls are popular souvenirs.

culturalTips.title: Mongolian Throat Singing
culturalTips.content: Khoomei (throat singing) is a traditional art where singers produce multiple tones simultaneously. Performances are magical experiences of human vocal capability.

culturalTips.title: Gift Giving
culturalTips.content: When visiting Mongolian families, bring small gifts (candy, tea, fruit). It shows respect. Gifts are received with both hands. Avoid giving knives or scissors.

culturalTips.title: Starry Nights
culturalTips.content: Remote grassland areas have minimal light pollution, offering spectacular views of the Milky Way. Summer nights are best for stargazing. Bring warm layers.

culturalTips.title: Nomadic Lifestyle
culturalTips.content: Traditional Mongolians still practice seasonal migration with their livestock. Some families offer homestays for visitors to experience authentic nomadic life.

emergencyContacts.name: 呼伦贝尔急救中心
emergencyContacts.notes: Major hospitals in city centers have English interpretation

emergencyContacts.name: 呼伦贝尔市公安局
emergencyContacts.notes: Tourist police at major scenic areas

emergencyContacts.name: 呼伦贝尔旅游警察
emergencyContacts.notes: English-speaking tourist police at major attractions

emergencyContacts.name: 俄罗斯驻呼和浩特总领事馆
emergencyContacts.notes: For Russian citizens in Hulunbuir region

emergencyContacts.name: 蒙古国驻呼和浩特总领事馆
内蒙古路政
emergencyContacts.notes: For grassland road conditions and emergencies

quickFacts.language: Mandarin Chinese, Mongolian (Mongolian script), Russian (in border areas)
quickFacts.water: Tap water safe after boiling; bottled water recommended
